title: Law governing
doc_html:
§2488.38.  Law governing

Except as otherwise provided herein, or in the Home Rule Charter of the city of Baker, the city court shall be governed and operated in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 13:1871 et seq.  

Acts 1970, No. 424, §18.
